content: I'm trying to find some social events in Chicago this weekend. I just moved here from the Bay Area and don't know many people yet.
Welcome to Chicago! What kind of events are you looking for? There are lots of options depending on your interests.
I'm really into aquariums and 3D printing. I was thinking about checking out the Shedd Aquarium or maybe a maker space. Do you know of any good spots for those?

The Shedd Aquarium is fantastic - it's one of the largest indoor aquariums in the world. For 3D printing, there's a great maker space called 'Chicago Maker Lab' that has open workshops on weekends. They also have a monthly 'Print & Sip' event where you can learn about 3D printing while enjoying local craft beers.
That maker space sounds perfect! I'll definitely check out their weekend workshop. And I've been wanting to visit the Shedd Aquarium since I moved here. Thanks for the suggestions!
